SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.storage.NChar

Packages that use NChar
Package
Description
com.nib.commons
Common utilities and core runtime components for the NIB application framework.
com.nib.commons.esql
API classes for Embedded SQL (E/SQL) integration and runtime support.
com.nib.commons.io
Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.
com.nib.commons.io.vsam
Provides classes and interfaces for emulating VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organizations.
com.nib.commons.storage
Provides components for managing memory storage and simulating mainframe-like data types.
com.nib.commons.utils
General purpose utility classes for common operations.
com.nib.scripting
NIB scripting framework.
com.nib.scripting.utils.dbutils
DB API
com.nib.scripting.utils.nibsort
SORT
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.commands
CICS-like commands API classes.
com.nib.supernaut.tcp
TCP/IP socket communication support for Supernaut.
com.nib.utilities.api.le
Language Environment (LE) API utilities.

  • Uses of NChar in com.nib.commons.io

    Methods in com.nib.commons.io with parameters of type NChar
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AbstractFile
    AbstractFile.fileStatusIs(NChar fileStatus)
    Assigns the file status field and returns teh current instance.
    SequentialFile
    SequentialFile.fileStatusIs(NChar fileStatus)
    Sets the file status field for the file.

  • Uses of NChar in com.nib.commons.io.vsam

    Methods in com.nib.commons.io.vsam with parameters of type NChar
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    EntrySequentialFile
    EntrySequentialFile.fileStatusIs(NChar fileStatus)
    Sets the file status field for the current EntrySequentialFile instance.
    KeySequentialFile
    KeySequentialFile.fileStatusIs(NChar fileStatus)
    Sets the file status field for the current instance of KeySequentialFile using the specified NChar file status.
    RecordRelativeFile
    RecordRelativeFile.fileStatusIs(NChar fileStatus)
    Sets the file status for the current instance of RecordRelativeFile and returns the instance itself.

  • Uses of NChar in com.nib.commons.storage

    Subclasses of NChar in com.nib.commons.storage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    NCharBin
    The NCharBin class extends the functionality of the NChar class.
    class 
    NCharInspected
    The NCharInspected class extends the NChar class by providing additional functionality to inspect and replace characters or substrings within the character sequence.
    class 
    SpecialRegister
    The SpecialRegister class is a specialized extension of the NChar class used for creating and managing special register instances with predefined initial values.
    Fields in com.nib.commons.storage declared as NChar
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    NChar
    NVarcharField.txt

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    NChar
    NChar.allocate()
     
    NChar
    NChar.ascii()
     
    NChar
    NChar.ebcdic()
     
    NChar
    NChar.highValues()
     
    NChar
    NChar.initial(byte value)
    Sets the initial value of this NChar instance to the specified byte value.
    NChar
    NChar.initial(byte[] value)
    Sets the initial value of this NChar instance to the specified byte array value.
    NChar
    NChar.initial(char value)
    Sets the initial value of this NChar instance to the specified char value.
    NChar
    NChar.initial(String value)
    Sets the initial value of this NChar instance to the specified string value.
    NChar
    NChar.justified(AbstractNField.Justified j)

    NChar.lowValues()

    NChar.redefines(IDataArea da)

    NChar.spaces()
     
    Methods in com.nib.commons.storage with parameters of type NChar
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    StringValue.equals(NChar field)
    Compares the current string value with the specified NChar field for equality.
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.inspectAndConvertCharacters(AbstractNField source, NChar target)
    Inspects the characters in the provided source field within the current value of the field instance and converts them based on the target specifications.
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.inspectAndConvertCharacters(AbstractNField source, NChar target, Integer offset, Integer length)
    Inspects the source AbstractNField, extracts its character sequence, and converts the specified segment of characters into a target character sequence replacing the current value of the field instance.
    NCharInspected
    AbstractNField.inspectAndReplaceAll(NChar target, NChar replace)
    Inspects and replaces all occurrences of a target character within the current value of the field instance with a replacement character.
    NCharInspected
    AbstractNField.inspectAndReplaceAll(NChar target, String replace)
    Inspects the target NChar value and performs a replacement of all its occurrences with the specified replacement string within the current value of the field instance.
    NCharInspected
    AbstractNField.inspectAndReplaceAll(String target, NChar replace)
    Inspects the given target string for a specific character within the current value of the field instance and replaces all occurrences with the specified new character.
    NCharInspected
    AbstractNField.inspectAndReplaceCharacters(NChar replace)
    Inspects and replaces specific characters within the current value of the field instance.
    NCharInspected
    AbstractNField.inspectAndReplaceLeading(NChar replace, NChar value)
    Inspects the leading character of the content and replaces it within the current value of the field instance with the specified replacement character if applicable.
    NCharInspected
    AbstractNField.inspectAndReplaceLeading(NChar replace, String value)
    Inspects the leading characters of the given string and replaces them within the current value of the field instance as needed with the specified replacement character.
    NCharInspected
    AbstractNField.inspectAndReplaceLeading(String replace, NChar value)
    Inspects the given NChar value for leading characters and replaces them within the current value of the field instance with the specified string.
    void
    AbstractNNumeric.setValue(NChar value)
    Sets the value of the current field using the provided NChar instance.
    void
    NChar.setValue(NChar field)
    Sets the value of this NChar instance using the specified NChar field.
    void
    NChar.unstring(byte delimiter, NChar... into)
    Splits the current string representation of the object based on the specified delimiter and assigns the resulting substrings into the provided NChar objects.
    void
    NChar.unstring(char delimiter, NChar... into)
    Splits the current string representation of the value using the specified delimiter and assigns the resulting parts into the provided NChar objects.
    void
    NChar.unstring(SpecialRegister delimiter, NChar... into)
    Splits a value using the specified delimiter and assigns the resulting parts into the provided NChar objects.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DeleteQTdCommand
    SupernautContext.deleteQTd(NChar queue)
    Creates a DELETEQ TD command.
    DeleteQTsCommand
    SupernautContext.deleteQTs(NChar queue)
    Creates a DELETEQ TS command.
    DocumentCreateCommand
    SupernautContext.documentCreate(NChar doctoken)
    Creates a DOCUMENT CREATE command using a document token.
    DocumentDeleteCommand
    SupernautContext.documentDelete(NChar doctoken)
    Creates a DOCUMENT DELETE command using a document token.
    DocumentInsertCommand
    SupernautContext.documentInsert(NChar doctoken)
    Creates a DOCUMENT INSERT command using a document token.
    DocumentRetrieveCommand
    SupernautContext.documentRetrieve(NChar doctoken)
    Creates a DOCUMENT RETRIEVE command using a document token.
    DocumentSetCommand
    SupernautContext.documentSet(NChar doctoken)
    Creates a DOCUMENT SET command using a document token.
    GetContainerCommand
    SupernautContext.getContainer(NChar containerName)
    Creates a GET CONTAINER command using a container name as an NChar.
    InquireTransactionCommand
    SupernautContext.inquireTransaction(NChar c)
    Creates an INQUIRE TRANSACTION command using a transaction name as an NChar.
    LinkCommand
    SupernautContext.link(NChar program)
    Creates and initializes a new LinkCommand with the specified program.
    LoadCommand
    SupernautContext.loadProgram(NChar program)
    Creates a LOAD command for the specified program name represented as `NChar`.
    PutContainerCommand
    SupernautContext.putContainer(NChar containerName)
    Creates a PUT CONTAINER command using a container name as an NChar.
    ReadQTdCommand
    SupernautContext.readQTd(NChar queue)
    Creates a READQ TD command.
    ReadQTsCommand
    SupernautContext.readQTs(NChar queue)
    Creates a READQ TS command.
    ReturnCommand
    SupernautContext.returnTransid(NChar transid)
    Creates a RETURN TRANSID command.
    SpoolCloseCommand
    SupernautContext.spoolClose(NChar token)
    Creates a SPOOLCLOSE command using a token.
    SpoolOpenInputCommand
    SupernautContext.spoolOpenInput(NChar token)
    Creates a SPOOLOPEN INPUT command using a token.
    SpoolOpenOutputCommand
    SupernautContext.spoolOpenOutput(NChar token)
